'''Tekil Barje''' was a native of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[File:TekilBarje.jpg|thumb|left|Tekil Barje in [[Wayfar/Legends|Wayfar]] during the Galactic Civil War.]]

Barje's parents, [[Conil Barje|Conil]] and [[Camelle Barje|Camelle]], moved from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to begin life as [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]]. His father was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when he was only an infant, during a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken]] [[Attack on Mochot Steep|raid]] at [[Mochot Steep/Legends|Mochot Steep]]. His own life was only spared because of the intervention of the Sand people's [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Warchief, [[Sharad Hett]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Tekil Barje was a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on December 15, 2011.
